note: Live-site signal -> host transfer cost mapping. Per-host outbound transfer (egress / Fast Data Transfer / bandwidth) rate and whether the host bills it. Cloudflare Pages static egress is free (performance-only, $0). Estimated $/mo multiplies sourced $/GB by `assumedMonthlyVisits` page-equivalent fetches; the visit count is an explicit assumption, not a measured number — treat $/mo as directional, not an invoice. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: Vercel Fast Data Transfer $0.15/GB (region-dependent 0.15-0.35); Pro includes 1 TB FDT
Netlify bandwidth ~20 credits/GB on the $20 / 3000-credit Pro plan (~$0.00667/credit) => ~$0.133/GB
Cloudflare Pages static asset requests and egress are free (no bandwidth charge); performance-only signal
